cues.name: Vogue (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: On each measure, every light moves to its own random stage bearing over 1600ms (set-position).

cues.name: Wave (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Horizontal linear sweep ±20° from home; half-cycle per beat (speed = BPM / 240).

cues.name: Nod (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Vertical linear sweep toward downstage and back; one full cycle per beat (speed = BPM / 120).

cues.name: Clockwise Sync (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Circle pattern; one full orbit per 4/4 measure (speed = BPM / 480).

cues.name: Counter-Clockwise Sync (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Same as Clockwise Sync with reverse direction (speed = BPM / 480).

cues.name: Clockwise Fan Spread (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Circle with 360° fan spread; measure-synced speed (BPM / 480).

cues.name: Counter-Clockwise Fan Spread (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Same as Clockwise Fan Spread with reverse direction (BPM / 480).

cues.name: Figure-8 (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Figure-8 Lissajous in pan/tilt (speed = BPM / 240).

cues.name: Still
cues.description: No motion: returns all lights to their home position.

cues.name: Searchlights
cues.description: Every 4 beats, each light wanders to random pan/tilt offsets within ±30° from home; movement duration spans 4 beats.

cues.name: Cross Beat Half
cues.description: Same alternating even/odd tilt toward stage bearings as Cross Beat, but only on every second beat; movement duration spans two beats. Beat length from detected audio BPM.
